nasb.text: ‘You shall not make for yourself an idol, or any likeness of what is in heaven above or on the earth beneath or in the water under the earth.

esv.text: “‘You shall not make for yourself a carved image, or any likeness of anything that is in heaven above, or that is on the earth beneath, or that is in the water under the earth.

cnv.text: “‘你不可為自己做偶像，也不可做天上、地下和地底下水中各物的形象。

ccb.text: “‘不可为自己雕刻神像，不可仿照任何飞禽走兽或水族的样子造神像，
